issues.description: Protected pages do not verify the temporary login flag. home/home.html, home/employees.html and home/edit/index.html can be opened directly without going through the login form.
reproducibleSteps: Open home/home.html directly in the browser
Observe that the dashboard loads without checking sessionStorage

issues.description: The admin account and password are hardcoded in frontend source code.
Dashboard buttons and top-right icons are visible, but only the employees button has a real action. schedule, attendance, yidingInfo, help and settings are no-op placeholders.
reproducibleSteps: Click 班表, 打卡, 弈鼎资料, ?, or ⚙

issues.description: The edit schedule page exists as a separate runtime entry, but the current dashboard does not route to it.
reproducibleSteps: Open home/edit/index.html directly and observe that the page exists

issues.description: The imported Airtable seed currently contains 25 records with no YDI ID, English name or Vietnamese name, so the UI renders a noticeable number of nearly empty employee cards.
reproducibleSteps: Observe cards where the main fields are empty or show 未設定

issues.description: Visible department names and some relationship/option values are raw imported strings instead of a fully normalized Traditional Chinese display set. Examples include Operation, Cage, Hr, MOM, DADDY and Bạn.
reproducibleSteps: Inspect department names in the sidebar or option lists in the form
Observe mixed English and non-Traditional Chinese values

issues.description: All employee edits are stored only in localStorage. There is no API call, backend persistence or shared source of truth in the runtime code.
reproducibleSteps: Edit or add an employee in one browser profile
Reload and observe persistence in that browser
Open the same page in another browser/profile and observe that changes are not shared

issues.description: employees-data.js is a very large generated frontend data dump that couples runtime UI code to an exported Airtable snapshot and increases frontend bundle size.
reproducibleSteps: Observe that the file embeds the full imported employee dataset and option lists directly in frontend code

issues.description: The HTML contains a bottom daily statistics table, but edit-schedule.js never queries or renders that bottom table section.
reproducibleSteps: Observe that the 每日統計 section remains empty
